productName: Ooowee - JUICED 1G Hydrocarbon Concentrate - Peach Passion - Truffle Oreos - 1g
description: This hybrid BHO concentrate distills Truffle Oreos down to its potent essence through precision closed-loop extraction and a clean solvent purge. Potent, clean, and lab-tested — a soft, juicy peach flavor, with a versatile, anytime balance.
